broadcast_audit.notes: Summary explicitly starts with ADOPT and references consensus item line 1 in consensus.jsonl.
Summary explicitly starts with ADOPT and references consensus item line 2 in consensus.jsonl.
Uses adopted_items=['con-003-telemetry-pass'] instead of consensus_item_id, and the summary is informational rather than an explicit adopt recommendation.

commander_agent_adoption.notes: The commander agent workflow covers launch, collection, validation, and bundle writing, but the agent contract does not describe collab ledgers, a broadcast->adopt step, or adopted consensus fields in the bundle shape. Adoption appears only in the launcher prompt, not in the agent file itself.

launcher_enforcement.notes: stampede.sh creates the collab protocol with propose->peer_review->improve->consensus->broadcast->adopt and tells commanders to include adopted consensus ids/source_refs, but there is no launcher-side validation that a commander emitted a broadcast or adopted anything before bundle/result completion.

skill_adoption.notes: SKILL.md documents synthesis and auto-merge, but not the collab bus, adopt phase, or broadcast/consensus ledger consumption.

merger_behavior.notes: stampede-merge.sh merges branches discovered from results JSON only; it does not read collab ledgers or gate merge on broadcast/adoption evidence.

monitor_behavior.notes: stampede-monitor.sh prints a collab summary with proposal/review/improvement/consensus/broadcast counts, but it does not display adoption state or validate broadcast structure.

atoms_context.notes: No prior squad atom JSON files were present in the atoms directory, so there was nothing to de-duplicate against.

gaps: broadcasts.jsonl is schema-inconsistent: bcast-003-findings omits consensus_item_id and uses adopted_items instead.
broadcasts.jsonl line 3 is not an explicit adopt recommendation, unlike the first two broadcast entries.
agents/stampede-commander.agent.md does not define a post-broadcast adoption step or adopted consensus fields in the bundle contract.
bin/stampede.sh instructs adopt behavior but does not enforce that commanders broadcast or adopt before completion.
skills/SKILL.md does not document the adopt phase or any synthesis/merge consumption of collab ledgers.
bin/stampede-merge.sh ignores broadcasts/consensus entirely and performs no adoption validation.
bin/stampede-monitor.sh surfaces broadcast counts only, not adoption status or invalid broadcast entries.
evidence: collab/broadcasts.jsonl:1 -> bcast-c001-adopt-blockers summary begins 'ADOPT:' and references consensus_item_id cons-c001-pre-build-blockers with source_refs.
collab/broadcasts.jsonl:2 -> bcast-c001-adopt-majors summary begins 'ADOPT:' and references consensus_item_id cons-c001-pre-build-majors with source_refs.
collab/broadcasts.jsonl:3 -> bcast-003-findings has source_refs and adopted_items but no consensus_item_id and no explicit ADOPT recommendation in summary.
collab/consensus.jsonl:4 -> con-003-telemetry-pass exists, matching broadcast line 3 adopted_items rather than consensus_item_id.
agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:41-61 -> required workflow ends at bundle writing and contains no broadcast/adopt step.
agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:140-168 -> completion validation checks launch proof/model policy, not adoption/broadcast proof.
agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:238-267 -> bundle shape includes consensus notes but no adopted_consensus_item_ids or source_refs fields.
bin/stampede.sh:904-911 -> commander prompt instructs consume broadcasts and include adopted consensus item_ids/source_refs, but this is prompt text only.
bin/stampede.sh:1071-1085 and bin/stampede-monitor.sh:295-307 -> run completion is driven by result files/task counts, not broadcast/adoption validation.
skills/SKILL.md:631-665 -> synthesis and merge guidance discuss branch merges only; no collab/adopt/broadcast ledger consumption is described.
bin/stampede-merge.sh:87-99 and 141-199 -> merger builds branch list from results/*.json and merges branches without reading collab ledgers.
bin/stampede-monitor.sh:143-193 -> commander status display shows launch proof telemetry, not adoption status.
commanders/commander-002/squads/sq-017/atoms -> directory contained no existing JSON atoms.
